title: Add HAL serial-local chosen precedence tests
description: Final review of project-LICHEN-ev5b.3 found that HAL serial-local precedence should be covered by a positive build/run test. Add a HAL test overlay/config that enables CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_SERIAL_LOCAL and verifies lichen_hal_serial_device_get() prefers lichen,native-uart, then zephyr,uart-pipe, then zephyr,shell-uart, with zephyr,console only as last fallback. Use native_sim or qemu_x86 if the board exposes two distinct serial devices; otherwise add a compile-only test fixture.
notes:
Discovered during final codereview for project-LICHEN-ev5b.3. The implementation now prefers lichen,native-uart, zephyr,uart-pipe, zephyr,shell-uart, then zephyr,console; this follow-up adds positive coverage for that precedence.
Implemented no-hardware HAL serial-local precedence coverage as new lichen/tests/hal_serial_precedence Twister suite. It enables CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_SERIAL_LOCAL on qemu_x86 and uses per-scenario overlays to prove precedence with distinct selected vs lower-priority UART devices: lichen,native-uart over uart-pipe/slip/shell/console, zephyr,uart-pipe over slip/shell/console, zephyr,slip-uart over shell/console, zephyr,shell-uart over console, and console fallback. Initial review found P2 gaps: no slip-uart scenario and native-uart shared device with console could false-pass; fixed by adding qemu_x86_uart_pipe and qemu_x86_slip_uart overlays and assigning expected higher-priority rungs to uart1 while lower rungs use uart0. Checks: git diff --check PASS. EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr: west twister -T lichen/tests/hal_serial_precedence -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-hal-serial-precedence-v2 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS: 5 scenarios/5 instances selected, 5/5 configs passed, 0 skipped, 0 failed, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 5 test cases executed, 111.28s. Final codereviews: Fermat no P0/P1/P2, noted shell/console overlays rely on qemu_x86 having no default zephyr,slip-uart; Mendel no P0/P1/P2; Goodall no P0/P1/P2 and confirmed full precedence chain and corrected false-positive risk.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware HAL serial-local chosen precedence coverage. Added qemu_x86 Twister suite proving native-uart, uart-pipe, slip-uart, shell-uart, and console fallback ordering with distinct devices; EC2 Twister passed 5/5 with 0 warnings; three final codereviews found no P0/P1/P2.
